name: Seritage Growth Properties 7.00% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares of Beneficial Interest
summary: Seritage Growth Properties is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on redeveloping and re-leasing retail properties. The 7.00% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares represent a specific class of ownership with associated dividend rights. Seritage Growth Properties is based in New York, NY.
